name: Adidas
message: [AI generated] Adidas is a renowned German multinational corporation that specializes in sports apparel, shoes, and accessories. Founded by Adolf Dassler in 1949, its headquarters located in Herzogenaurach, Germany. The company is globally recognized for its performance and lifestyle products, including football kits, running shoes, training gear and streetwear. Today, Adidas stands as one of the leading sports brands worldwide.
